approval.note: Repository changes require diff-bound review and green CI before merge.

title: SW-005B — Add live Grabowski operational projection
goal: Add bounded source adapters and views for hosts, runtime health, current work and known gaps without embedding secrets or treating projections as authority.

acceptance.assertion: Each live source declares authority, freshness, collection error and stale-state semantics.
A deterministic snapshot excludes secrets, raw command output and unstable provider identifiers.
The operator overview distinguishes static contract facts from live observed state and unavailable data.
Fixtures cover healthy, stale, partial and unavailable source states.
